2026-03-16.patch_summary: This patch adds a new SUNRPC_CMD_CACHE_FLUSH generic netlink command that allows userspace to flush the sunrpc auth caches (ip_map and unix_gid) without writing to /proc/net/rpc/*/flush. The command is used by exportfs to replace its /proc-based cache_flush() with a netlink equivalent, providing a fallback to /proc for older kernels. An optional attribute selects which caches to flush, or all caches if omitted.
